title: Track Expected Returns
description: The system shall allow users to flag an expense as 'Return Expected'. A dashboard widget shall display pending returns, and the timeline shall visually indicate flagged expenses.
acceptance_criteria: Expense entry UI includes a boolean 'Return Expected' toggle
Dashboard contains a widget showing a list or count of pending expected returns
Timeline items for flagged expenses show a visual indicator (Reply icon)
Refund transactions on the timeline display absolute sum values (without minus signs)
Refund transactions on the timeline use a distinct Blue color (e.g., #2196F3)
Refund transactions on the timeline include a small overlay icon at the bottom-left of the category icon
